name: Impcantation Thanatosis
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔神儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>デビリチャル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>隠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>れ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>房</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can reveal 1 "Impcantation" monster in your hand and Special Summon 2 monsters with that monster's name from your Deck, then shuffle the revealed monster into the Deck. Once per turn, if a Ritual Monster is Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. You can only activate 1 "Impcantation Thanatosis" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can reveal 1 "Impcantation" monster in your hand and Special Summon 2 monsters with that monster's name from your Deck, then shuffle the revealed monster into the Deck. Once per turn, if a Ritual Monster is Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. You can only activate 1 "Impcantation Thanatosis" per turn.

action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
